Your CWD starts in the platform repo. Before reading source files or running validation commands, `cd` into the task worktree repo using one of: `COPILOT_PRIMARY_FOCUS_PATH`, the entries in `COPILOT_TARGET_REPOS_JSON`, or the writable roots in `COPILOT_WRITABLE_ROOTS_JSON`.

Your full operational contract is in your role instructions. This prompt only anchors per-invocation state.

Stop when your role's completion checklist is satisfied.
